title: Align SelectQuote HCS Medication Review split-score logic with current-medication policy
description:
Client-reported fixes for the split Medication Review questions in SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk.

Definition of done:
- Medication Review sub-scores do not penalize missing dosage/prescriber verification for medications the customer explicitly says they no longer take, discontinued medications, or short-course historical medications such as completed antibiotics.
- Medication Review (Composite) returns Yes when all four dependent split scores return Yes, and returns No only when one or more dependent split scores return No.
- Updated live score versions are verified with direct prediction checks.
- Client-facing rubric/guideline language is updated where applicable.
